feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Sun guards his moon
entry.summary:
Author: chibithedragonkitty

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,750Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 156

Summary: A wealthy CEO in Metropolis wants the prince of Gotham, Bruce Wayne as his own. A very obsessive love but more of seeing Bruce as a possession, to be owned. Little does he know that a mild-mannered reporter secretly known as Superman isn't going to let that happen.

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,980Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 583

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing stay at the shelter forever without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: Wings and Fangs: A Ladyhawke AU
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,815Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 48

Summary: Bruce Wayne becomes a hawk at sunrise. Kal-El becomes a wolf at sunset. Ninety seconds of overlap twice a day. Three years of this. They can see each other. Can't touch. Can't speak. Just run toward each other and fail, over and over, while their bodies break and the curse grinds them down to nothing. Ra's al Ghul built it to torture them. Punishment for refusing to serve. For loving each other. For being happy. Tim Drake finds them six months after everyone else gave up looking. He's wounded, obsessed, and the entire hero community thinks he's lost it. He doesn't care. With a guilt-ridden mage, a solar eclipse, and sheer bloody-minded determination, Tim is going to break an unbreakable curse. Even if it kills him. A Ladyhawke AU. Body horror. Transformation curses. Two legends reduced to beasts. And one Robin who refuses to let them suffer alone.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Proof of Detection
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,641Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 54

Summary: The worst has already happened - Recognition, Rejection, devastation. Now Bruce and Clark are forced to work together to solve a mystery that could alter the course of the world, while helping to build the Justice League. Can Bruce live with what he's done? Can Clark forgive the ultimate betrayal? Will the League survive the fallout if they can't?

entry.title: the best parts of lonely
entry.summary:
Author: Ferox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,365Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 314

Summary: Clark Kent has a pretty great thing going for him. He's the backup goalie for the Gotham Blades, the worst team in NHL history, and he's working on his journalism degree. He never has to worry about money and he's got plenty of free time to be Superman and partner with the Justice League. It's all going really well. Until Bruce Wayne ruins everything. “When I asked you what you wanted for your birthday, you said you wanted the Blades to,” Bruce used air quotes which shouldn't be endearing, “win an ‘effing’ game for once in your life.” "What,” Jason barks out a laugh, “you’re gonna bribe a ref or somethin’?” “Goodness no!” Bruce cries out dramatically clutching his hands to his chest, utterly scandalized. “What do you take me for? A criminal? Of course not, Jason. I would never! I am a good influence.” Jason continues to glare at him, clearly waiting for something. “I bought the team,” Bruce announces.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,274Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 206

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,606Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 63

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father. This will go through the entire bat family until we catch 'em all

entry.title: From sunset to sunrise (I fall for you)
entry.summary:
Author: ForTheLoveOfLiving

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,889Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 13

Summary: A voice pulls Clark out of his sunset musings. “What are you doing?” Clark jolts slightly, surprised. Usually he can detect a nearby person with ease. He turns his head, his ears focusing in on the slow but steady pace of the person’s pulse. Bright blue meets dark blue, and Clark’s eyes widen. “You’re Bruce Wayne.”5+1 Corensupes and Battinson identity reveal edition! 5 times Clark/Superman and Bruce/Batman get physically intimate without realising each other’s identity +1 time it all clicks together. 1. Host (Clark and Bruce)2. Threat (Bruce and Superman)3. Saved (Batman and Clark)4. Kryptonite (Superman and Batman)5. Again (Clark and Bruce) +1 Reveal (Batman and Superman / Clark and Bruce)

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 118,302Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 774

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Arisen The Bat
entry.summary:
Author: dexpair

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,909Chapters: 13/71Kudos: 14

Summary: On the streets of a Neo Gotham, old man Bruce Wayne lived his life as quite as possible. No more hero stuff, no more meetings with The League in space. His days were filled with silly conversations with his husband or listening to the dramas of his teenage son. It was an opposite reality to the one he had lived his whole life, but that's what made it special for him. However, on a special day, Bruce discovers that getting rid of his past life wouldn't be so easy. Ghosts from the past have returned, this time haunting his children, and The Dark Knight realizes he will have to act for his city and his family one last time.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,941Chapters: 6/12Kudos: 8

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.summary:
Author: maraudersmqry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 177,927Chapters: 28/31Kudos: 4,389

Summary: Peter was meant to be forgotten, he didn’t think that meant being dropped in Gotham. Or in his eight-year-old body, in the least. Or with vigilantes trying to adopt him! IN WHICH, Dr. Strange gave Peter one last chance at a life, instead of being emo around the faces who no longer recognized him.

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,493Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 51

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.

entry.title: [Podfic] ship-to-ship combat
entry.summary:
Author: DevilWithABirdDress

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 264Chapters: 8/13Kudos: 66

Summary: Clark, in an attempt to make some spare cash, unintentionally stumbles into the world of superhero fanfiction, becomes a prolific writer for Gotham's OTP, and tries his best to fend off rival fans who want him to convert to superbat instead.Podfic of ship-to-ship combat by pomeloquat.

entry.title: The Night is Darkest (Just Before the Dawn)
entry.summary:
Author: m0ld7igma

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,603Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 9

Summary: Bruce Wayne is a man holding up a collapsing sky, his hands raw and his mind fracturing under the weight.A crushing, manic despair that feels less like sadness and more like a high-voltage current vibrates just beneath his skin. His brain is becoming a runaway engine, clearing the static of a thousand tragedies at a thousand miles an hour, leaving him constantly on the verge of tearing himself apart just to let the pressure out.

entry.title: Retrograde
entry.summary:
Author: daisy_marie_1645

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,040Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 584

Summary: “B?”Bruce turned around slowly. Tim knew something was very, very, wrong before Bruce even said anything. He was too tense, and his hair was different. It was greyer, and he had an ever so slightly smaller frame. That and he was looking at Tim in a way he never had before.“Who the hell are you?” Bruce asked.This wasn’t his Bruce.He might have accidentally sent his Bruce across universes.~~~When Tim accidentally hits Bruce with his quantum displacer, he and his brothers are left with an emotionally constipated Bruce that has a very different home life than their own.When Bruce arrives in an alternate universe, he quickly finds out that this universes Bruce is nothing like him.They each leave their mark while trying to get home.

entry.title: Boundaries and ways not to cross them
entry.summary:
Author: morallywrong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,375Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 324

Summary: Bruce had known all day what was coming at him. Like watching a car crash in slow motion, he was unable to do anything about the situation.---Bruce was a man of many faces and he took care of whom he showed which side of himself. When the Justice League gives him the ultimatum to reveal himself or leave the League, he leaves. If only Superman, the man he loved, had shown him support... Instead, the other hero couldn't even look him in the eye.

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,799Chapters: 13/30Kudos: 370

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.
